title: AI Assistant Chat Transcript
scenario: Simulate a chat between an AI assistant and a user who wants to plan a trip to Europe. The chat should cover itinerary suggestions, transportation, and accommodation options.
constraints: Must include at least 5 different destinations in Europe
Use a friendly and helpful tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the chat includes accurate and helpful suggestions for the user's trip.
Verify that the tone is friendly and helpful throughout the chat.
Assess if the chat covers at least 5 different European destinations.
